prompt: Create a plan for adding WebSocket support to this project. There is existing research at .prism/shared/research/2026-03-07-websocket-research.md.
expected_output: Interactive planning flow that loads research context before presenting understanding
expectations: prism-analyzer agent is spawned to extract decisions, constraints, and patterns from the research document
Understanding is presented to the user BEFORE writing the full plan (interactive rule)
User confirmation is requested before proceeding to full plan
Plan is NOT written in one shot -- structure approval is requested first
